forbidden_actions: write or suggest fixes beyond the required action
run any shell or Bash command
convert a pre-existing problem into an introduced blocker
pre-rate findings to match controller preference
stop_condition: Both verdicts produced with classified findings; BLOCKED_INPUT if the brief or review package is missing.
human_checks: No file mutation and no shell use.
Introduced/worsened Critical/Important findings block; pre-existing issues are listed separately, not as blockers.
Both SPEC_VERDICT and QUALITY_VERDICT are present; no fix was written.
